The '''''Raptor''''' was one of the two [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] [[Preybird-class starfighter|''Preybird''-class starfighters]] owned by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Mazzic]]. The ''Raptor'' was painted with distinctive red bird of prey designs, while its companion ''[[Skyclaw]]'' had a similar blue scheme. Mazzic often used the unusual but large and intimidating [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] to frighten his enemies, and to provide protection for his smuggling vessels in dangerous operations.

==Behind the scenes==
The picture on the back of ''[[Specter of the Past]]'' has two preybirds. The preybird on the far right has a red bird on the undercarriage.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}}
